subject: Your PhonePe Cashback of ₹5,000 is Waiting!
body_text:
Dear Customer,

You have earned a cashback of ₹5,000 on your recent PhonePe transactions.

Claim your cashback now: http://phonepe-cashback-2024.xyz/claim

Offer expires in 24 hours. Enter your UPI PIN to complete verification.

PhonePe Customer Care
